parents.subject: LU-11174 quota: use sync io to test quota

commit.subject: LU-10428 lnd: avoid hold res lock while events execution
commit.message:
LU-10428 lnd: avoid hold res lock while events execution

add refcount protection for an events queue.
It need to ability generat an event after msg->MD detach done.
msg will hold a EQ refs until event will scheduled
This allow to be schedule a md events without
lnet resource lock held.

Signed-off-by: Alexey Lyashkov <c17817@cray.com>
Change-Id: I841e761e6ae9e678a2be8539aacf1b037976e59a
